description.value: Aura faint universal; CL 1st; Slot hands; Price 2,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION The wearer of this slender white leather glove may, as a standard action, press it against any surface or object and cause a luminous handprint to appear. This print glows any color the wearer wishes, sheds light as a candle, and is easily visible from a distance of up to 60 feet. Such handprints last for 1 day before fading away. The glowing handprint matches the wearerâs hand in terms of size, position of fingers, and so on. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, arcane mark; Cost 1,000 gp.
